title: Component Curation
description: We hand-select the final component mix around your workload goals, acoustic targets, and visual direction.
detail: Each build is curated to balance thermals, reliability, and design language before we commit it to the bench.

title: The Foundation
description: Case, airflow path, and mounting surfaces are prepared before paste and cooler contact are finalised.
detail: This stage sets baseline thermal behaviour and reduces downstream tuning time.

title: Cable Artistry
description: Power and signal paths are routed for clean front presentation and serviceable internal access.
detail: Our cable pass prioritises airflow clarity and the boutique look clients expect.

title: Stress & Stability
description: Each commissioned build enters sustained load and mixed workload testing to catch zero-day instability.
detail: Voltage behaviour, fan curves, and memory stability are tuned for dependable long-session operation.

title: The Hand-off
description: Final photography, documentation, and protective packaging are completed before white-glove shipment.
detail: You receive setup notes, warranty terms, and direct support channels with your system.
